# RolePatch

> AI-powered resume tailoring. Score fit against a job description, rewrite bullets for the role, and prep for interviews. Guest mode available; Google sign-in for saved resumes.

Deployed on Cloudflare Workers. Uses Gemini for generation; Cloudflare D1 for persistence.

## Product

- [Home](https://rolepatch.com/): Value prop, demo, and sign-in
- [Free tools](https://rolepatch.com/tools): ATS check, keyword match, bullet check, word count, and more
- [Pricing](https://rolepatch.com/pricing): Plans and limits
- [Dashboard](https://rolepatch.com/dashboard): Saved resumes and tailoring history (signed in)
- [Privacy](https://rolepatch.com/privacy): Data handling and Gemini usage
- [Terms](https://rolepatch.com/terms): Terms of service

## Tools

- [ATS check](https://rolepatch.com/tools/ats-check): Parse-friendly resume structure check
- [Keywords](https://rolepatch.com/tools/keywords): Job-description keyword overlap
- [Bullet check](https://rolepatch.com/tools/bullet-check): Action-verb and impact lint for bullets

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/sarthak-fleet/resume-tailor): Source
- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Fleet context
